  "findings": [
    "Unsealed duct joints",
    "Use of non-compliant cloth duct tape or complete lack of approved mastic/foil tape sealing"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Remove any non-compliant cloth duct tape from joints",
    "Seal all duct joints and seams with approved mastic or UL 181A/B listed foil tape prior to insulation and close-out"
  ],
  "rationale": "Duct joints must be sealed airtight using approved mastic or UL 181 listed tape. Standard cloth duct tape degrades quickly and does not meet IMC or SMACNA standards for sealing ductwork.",
  "references": [
    "IMC Section 603.9",
    "SMACNA HVAC Duct Construction Standards",
    "ACCA Manual D"
  ]
}
